'''大岩山'''（おおいわやま他）
== 日本の山 == *大岩山 (福島県) - [[福島県]][[岩瀬郡]][[天栄村]]にある。標高932m。 *大岩山 (栃木県) - [[栃木県]][[足利市]]にある。標高417m。おおいわさん。 *大岩山 (山梨県) - [[山梨県]][[北杜市]]にある。標高2319m。 *大岩山 (長野県) - [[長野県]][[下水内郡]][[栄村]]にある。標高1947m。 *大岩山 (滋賀県) - [[滋賀県]][[伊香郡]][[余呉町]]にある。標高270m。 *[[大岩山 (京都府)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]]にある。標高182m。
{{aimai}} [[Category:同名の山]]

'''Ōiwayama''' (大岩山, おおいわやま, おおいわさん, おおいわざん)
== Mountains in Japan == * Ōiwayama (Fukushima Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ten'ei, Iwase District, Fukushima|ja|天栄村}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. Elevation: 932m. * Ōiwayama (Ashikaga, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ashikaga|ja|足利市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. Elevation: 417m. Pronounced "Ōiwasan." * Ōiwayama (Kanuma and Nikkō, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located on the border of {{ill|Kanuma|ja|鹿沼市}} and {{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. Elevation: 1267m. Pronounced "Ōiwayama." * Ōiwayama (Yamanashi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Hokuto, Yamanashi|ja|北杜市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}. Elevation: 2319m. * Ōiwayama (Nagano Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Sakae, Shimominochi District, Nagano|ja|栄村}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. Elevation: 1947m. * Ōiwayama (Shiga Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}. Elevation: 270m. * {{ill|Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|ja|大岩山 (京都府)}} - Located in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. Elevation: 182m.
== Sumo Wrestler == * {{ill|Ōiwayama Daigorō|ja|大岩山大五郎}} - A {{ill|Sumo wrestler|ja|大相撲力士}} from {{ill|Tatsunami stable|ja|立浪部屋}}, active from the 1930s to the late 1940s. Pronounced "Ōiwazan Daigorō."

== Mountains in Japan == * Ōiwayama (Fukushima Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ten'ei, Iwase District, Fukushima|ja|天栄村}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. Elevation: 932m. * Ōiwayama (Ashikaga, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ashikaga|ja|足利市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. Elevation: 417m. Pronounced "Ōiwasan." * Ōiwayama (Kanuma and Nikkō, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located on the border of {{ill|Kanuma|ja|鹿沼市}} and {{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. Elevation: 1267m. Pronounced "Ōiwayama." * Ōiwayama (Yamanashi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Hokuto, Yamanashi|ja|北杜市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}. Elevation: 2319m. * Ōiwayama (Nagano Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Sakae, Shimominochi District, Nagano|ja|栄村}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. Elevation: 1947m. * Ōiwayama (Shiga Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Nagahama|ja|長浜市}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|ja|滋賀県}}. Elevation: 270m. * {{ill|Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|ja|大岩山 (京都府)}} - Located in {{ill|Kyoto|ja|京都市}}, {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|ja|京都府}}. Elevation: 182m.
== Sumo Wrestler == * {{ill|Ōiwayama Daigorō|ja|大岩山大五郎}} - A {{ill|Sumo wrestler|ja|大相撲力士}} from {{ill|Tatsunami stable|ja|立浪部屋}}, active from the 1930s to the late 1940s. Pronounced "Ōiwazan Daigorō."

== Mountains in Japan == * Ōiwayama (Fukushima Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ten'ei, Iwase District, Fukushima|ja|天栄村}}, {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|ja|福島県}}. Elevation: 932m. * Ōiwayama (Ashikaga, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Ashikaga|ja|足利市}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|ja|栃木県}}. Elevation: 417m. Pronounced "Ōiwasan." * Ōiwayama (Kanuma and Nikkō, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located on the border of {{ill|Kanuma|ja|鹿沼市}} and {{ill|Nikkō|ja|日光市}}, Tochigi Prefecture. Elevation: 1267m. Pronounced "Ōiwayama." * Ōiwayama (Yamanashi Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Hokuto, Yamanashi|ja|北杜市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山梨県}}. Elevation: 2319m. * Ōiwayama (Nagano Prefecture) - Located in {{ill|Sakae, Shimominochi District, Nagano|ja|栄村}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. revision.text:
'''大岩山'''（おおいわやま、おおいわさん、おおいわざん）
== 日本の山 == * 大岩山 (福島県) - [[福島県]][[岩瀬郡]][[天栄村]]にある。標高932m。 * 大岩山 (栃木県足利市) - [[栃木県]][[足利市]]にある。標高417m。おおいわさん。 * 大岩山 (栃木県鹿沼市・日光市) - [[栃木県]][[鹿沼市]]と[[日光市]]の境にある。標高1267m。おおいわやま。 * 大岩山 (山梨県) - [[山梨県]][[北杜市]]にある。標高2319m。 * 大岩山 (長野県) - [[長野県]][[下水内郡]][[栄村]]にある。標高1947m。 * 大岩山 (滋賀県) - [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]にある。標高270m。 * [[大岩山 (京都府)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]]にある。標高182m。
== 四股名 == * [[大岩山大五郎]]（おおいわざん・だいごろう） - 昭和10年代～昭和20年代後半にかけて活躍した、[[立浪部屋]]に所属した[[大相撲力士]]。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:おおいわさん}} [[Category:同名の山]]

revision.text:
'''大岩山'''（おおいわやま、おおいわさん、おおいわざん）
== 日本の山 == * 大岩山 (福島県) - [[福島県]][[岩瀬郡]][[天栄村]]にある。標高932m。 * 大岩山 (栃木県足利市) - [[栃木県]][[足利市]]にある。標高417m。おおいわさん。 * 大岩山 (栃木県鹿沼市・日光市) - [[栃木県]][[鹿沼市]]と[[日光市]]の境にある。標高1267m。おおいわやま。 * 大岩山 (山梨県) - [[山梨県]][[北杜市]]にある。標高2319m。 * 大岩山 (長野県) - [[長野県]][[下水内郡]][[栄村]]にある。標高1947m。 * 大岩山 (滋賀県) - [[滋賀県]][[長浜市]]にある。標高270m。 * [[大岩山 (京都府)]] - [[京都府]][[京都市]]にある。標高182m。
== 四股名 == * [[大岩山大五郎]]（おおいわざん・だいごろう） - 昭和10年代～昭和20年代後半にかけて活躍した、[[立浪部屋]]に所属した[[大相撲力士]]。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:おおいわさん}} [[Category:同名の山]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大岩山]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11434767]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:37, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Ōiwayama''' (大岩山, おおいわやま, おおいわさん, おおいわざん)
== Mountains in Japan == * Ōiwayama (Fukushima Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Ten-ei, Fukushima|Ten'ei, Iwase District, Fukushima]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. Elevation: 932m. * Ōiwayama (Ashikaga, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. Elevation: 417m. Pronounced "Ōiwasan." * Ōiwayama (Kanuma and Nikkō, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located on the border of [[:en:Kanuma, Tochigi|Kanuma]] and [[:en:Nikkō|Nikkō]], Tochigi Prefecture. Elevation: 1267m. Pronounced "Ōiwayama." * Ōiwayama (Yamanashi Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Hokuto, Yamanashi|Hokuto, Yamanashi]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]]. Elevation: 2319m. * Ōiwayama (Nagano Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Sakae, Nagano|Sakae, Shimominochi District, Nagano]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. Elevation: 1947m. * Ōiwayama (Shiga Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. Elevation: 270m. * {{ill|Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|ja|大岩山 (京都府)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|qq=|1=Mount Ōiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11434768}} - Located in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. Elevation: 182m.
== Sumo Wrestler == * {{ill|Ōiwayama Daigorō|ja|大岩山大五郎|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōiwayama Daigorō|qq=|1=Daigorō Ōiwazan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11434770}} - A {{ill|Sumo wrestler|ja|大相撲力士|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumo wrestler|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 力士|1=rikishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2727289}} from [[:en:Tatsunami stable|Tatsunami stable]], active from the 1930s to the late 1940s. Pronounced "Ōiwazan Daigorō."

== Mountains in Japan == * Ōiwayama (Fukushima Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Ten-ei, Fukushima|Ten'ei, Iwase District, Fukushima]], [[:en:Fukushima Prefecture|Fukushima Prefecture]]. Elevation: 932m. * Ōiwayama (Ashikaga, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Ashikaga, Tochigi|Ashikaga]], [[:en:Tochigi Prefecture|Tochigi Prefecture]]. Elevation: 417m. Pronounced "Ōiwasan." * Ōiwayama (Kanuma and Nikkō, Tochigi Prefecture) - Located on the border of [[:en:Kanuma, Tochigi|Kanuma]] and [[:en:Nikkō|Nikkō]], Tochigi Prefecture. Elevation: 1267m. Pronounced "Ōiwayama." * Ōiwayama (Yamanashi Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Hokuto, Yamanashi|Hokuto, Yamanashi]], [[:en:Yamanashi Prefecture|Yamanashi Prefecture]]. Elevation: 2319m. * Ōiwayama (Nagano Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Sakae, Nagano|Sakae, Shimominochi District, Nagano]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. Elevation: 1947m. * Ōiwayama (Shiga Prefecture) - Located in [[:en:Nagahama, Shiga|Nagahama]], [[:en:Shiga Prefecture|Shiga Prefecture]]. Elevation: 270m. * {{ill|Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|ja|大岩山 (京都府)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōiwayama (Kyoto Prefecture)|1=Mount Ōiwa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11434768}} - Located in [[:en:Kyoto|Kyoto]], [[:en:Kyoto Prefecture|Kyoto Prefecture]]. Elevation: 182m.
== Sumo Wrestler == * {{ill|Ōiwayama Daigorō|ja|大岩山大五郎|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōiwayama Daigorō|1=Daigorō Ōiwazan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11434770}} - A {{ill|Sumo wrestler|ja|大相撲力士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sumo wrestler|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 力士|1=rikishi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2727289}} from [[:en:Tatsunami stable|Tatsunami stable]], active from the 1930s to the late 1940s. Pronounced "Ōiwazan Daigorō."
